message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "client" as C1
participant "/auth" as Auth
participant "AuthDatabase" as DB
participant "/user" as U

C1 ->> Auth: POST username/password
Auth ->> DB: authToken
DB ->> Auth: RESPONSE authToken
Auth ->> C1: RESPONSE authToken

C1 ->> U: GET authToken/userId
U ->> DB: RESPONSE user profile data
@enduml
